headline: Todd Carriker, CEO of Rhino Networks, Addresses Cisco's Unified Networking Strategy for SMB Market
summary: ASHEVILLE, NC, June 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ASHEVILLE, NC - June 18, 2026 - - Rhino Networks, LLC, a Cisco Meraki preferred partner, today shared insights from its leadership regarding Cisco's ongoing convergence of traditional networking and cloud-managed Meraki platforms into a unified portfolio, highlighting significant implications for small and medium-sized businesses navigating network modernization decisions. headline: Intel jumps after Trump says Apple, Intel reached US chip deal
summary: Intel (INTC) surged 9% in premarket trading after President Trump said in a Truth Social post that Intel and Apple (AAPL) have agreed on a deal to design and build semiconductors in the US.

raw.headline: Intel jumps after Trump says Apple, Intel reached US chip deal

headline: Micron, Cisco & AT&T: Lessons From Dot Com Bust
summary: Micron exemplifies the dangers of investing at cyclical peaks, with revenues collapsing 70% a year after bullish analyst upgrades during the dot-com era. Read who this still applies today.

headline: Furl Expands Elite Leadership Team to Meet the Remediation Demand Mythos-Class AI Has Made Unavoidable
summary: Furl.ai, the agentic AI security remediation platform, today announced three strategic additions to its leadership team: Julian Waits to its Board of Directors, Joe Moles as Chief Technology Officer and Nick Levy as Enterprise Account Director. These appointments bring decades of frontline experience from the companies that defined the vulnerability management industry and signal a clear next chapter for Furl.
